discussion_comments.comment_body:
this change will add xp specific compile flags for ncnn and all targets that depends on ncnn by default.
make it enabled only on building for xp target

discussion_comments.comment_body: Thank you! I have edited them.

```
if(ANDROID_NDK)
```

some arm-linux toolchain file also defines ANDROID, it will break its build for missing libandroid.so
example https://github.com/Tencent/ncnn/blob/master/toolchains/hisiv600.toolchain.cmake

discussion_comments.comment_body:

it is the option to build ncnn without openmp, that's useful on some embedded platforms

discussion_comments.comment_body:
only a static library is generated for the ncnn target
linking openmp library is required when building shared library/module or executable, but makes nonsense here
